geo_loc_name_method: Obtained using the decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude coordinates to look up in the International Hydrographic Organization (IHO) geospatial World_Seas_IHO_v3 dataset.
samp_store_method_additional: Stored in a 1 L brown Nalgene bottle
samp_mat_process: Water samples were collected from the Niskin bottle into 1 L bottles then filtered through a 0.22 micron sterivex filter using a peristaltic pump with tubing attached to the outlet end of the sterivex.
prep_method_additional: 2 mL of 96% molecular grade ethanol used for preservation
nucl_acid_ext_kit: Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit
nucl_acid_ext_modify: Modified for sterivex, reagent volume altered
concentration_method: Qubit Fluorometer v.4 dsDNA high sensitivity kit
nucl_acid_ext_method_additional: Extractions completed in a Biosafety Cabinet for sterility purposes.
tot_depth_water_col_method: Looked up in the GEBCO 2024 bathymetric dataset using the decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude coordinates.
measurements_from: Environmental metadata for eDNA samples were primarily sourced from the CTD bottle file primary sensors. In instances where CTD data were unavailable, measurements were substituted using data from the colocated oceanographic mooring (42 m). Location and depth metadata (geo_loc_name, altitude, and tot_depth_water_col) were calculated as described in the 'method' field; in the absence of a specified method, these values represent direct measurements.
altitude_method: Calculated by subtracting the maximumDepthInMeters from the tot_depth_water_col. Note that localized variances in bathymetric data may result in negative values.

tot_depth_water_col_method: Looked up in the GEBCO 2024 bathymetric dataset using the decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude coordinates.
measurements_from: Environmental metadata for eDNA samples were primarily sourced from the CTD bottle file primary sensors. In instances where CTD data were unavailable, measurements were substituted using data from the colocated oceanographic mooring (42 m). Location and depth metadata (geo_loc_name, altitude, and tot_depth_water_col) were calculated as described in the 'method' field; in the absence of a specified method, these values represent direct measurements.
altitude_method: Calculated by subtracting the maximumDepthInMeters from the tot_depth_water_col. Note that localized variances in bathymetric data may result in negative values.

geo_loc_name_method: Obtained using the decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude coordinates to look up in the International Hydrographic Organization (IHO) geospatial World_Seas_IHO_v3 dataset.
samp_store_method_additional: Stored in a 1 L brown Nalgene bottle
samp_mat_process: Water samples were collected from the Niskin bottle into 1 L bottles then filtered through a 0.22 micron sterivex filter using a peristaltic pump with tubing attached to the outlet end of the sterivex.
prep_method_additional: 2 mL of 96% molecular grade ethanol used for preservation
nucl_acid_ext_kit: Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit
nucl_acid_ext_modify: Modified for sterivex, reagent volume altered
